_metadata.description: AWS services that consume a KMS CMK and the key-policy Statement requirements AWS enforces for each. Only services explicitly verified via deploy+teardown testing are included. Unknown consumer types emit KMS-CONSUMER-UNKNOWN warnings at hook time with a pointer to this file. Add new entries only after verifying the principal + required actions against the service's own "Encrypting data with KMS for <service>" developer guide page.
sources: Each entry: the specific service's "Encrypting data with KMS for <service>" page
_metadata.verification: Every consumer below has been validated in at least one smoke-test deploy+teardown cycle
_metadata.curation: This file is hand-curated. New entries require a deploy-verified principal + required_actions per service. No automated scraper — AWS docs for KMS consumer permissions are per-service prose.

AWS::ECS::Cluster.conditions_hint: StringEquals aws:SourceAccount; Fargate ephemeral storage uses fargate.amazonaws.com with kms:GenerateDataKeyWithoutPlaintext + kms:CreateGrant and aws:ecs:clusterAccount/clusterName encryption-context keys
